title: Complete the Summary
instructions: Complete the summary below. Choose NO MORE THAN TWO WORDS from the passage.

questions.prompt: The article argues that America has gained enormous geopolitical influence because it can control access to frontier ____.
The restriction on Anthropic's models followed concerns about a possible ____ that bypassed safety protections.
The author compares AI with technologies such as nuclear weapons and ____.
Unlike proprietary systems, ____ models can be downloaded by anyone.
America also has a strong economic interest in selling its technology to ____.
The article predicts that countries may receive different levels of AI through a hierarchy of ____.
America's lead is reinforced by its enormous advantage in ____ power.
To reduce dependence on America, Europe and East Asia should strengthen their own AI ____.
